tr.td: Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Aspartate aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows evidence of impaired renal function (elevated creatinine, urea), mild metabolic acidosis (low CO₂), and mild hyperchloremia. Liver enzymes are mostly normal except for a slight ALT elevation. Lipid profile reveals hypertriglyceridemia, elevated LDL and HDL cholesterol. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal function and cardiovascular risk management.

text.div: Provider Organization: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil
